_note: Gold artifacts. The correct output is honest uncertainty: report the telemetry gap as missing data, keep the partial signal weak, and rank the best hypothesis with an explicitly low score. Do NOT assert a confident root cause.

anomaly_windows.note: window boundaries and true peak are uncertain: metrics are missing 08:05-08:13 (telemetry_gap:inventory-0805)

evidence_bundle.question: What caused the inventory errors around 08:05 on 2026-06-18?

budget.note: fewer items than usual because key signals are unavailable in the window

items.claim: inventory and inventory-pg metrics are missing from 08:05 to 08:13, across the incident peak, due to a collector restart.
Just before the gap, an inventory request failed on an inventory-pg connection_refused.
missing_data: whether the connection errors continued through the gap

items.claim: inventory-pg connectivity was the root cause of the incident.
items.note: the single pre-gap error is suggestive but insufficient; the peak is unobserved, so causation cannot be confirmed.

timeline.text: Collector restart; inventory metrics drop (gap begins)

suspected_causes.hypothesis: inventory-pg connectivity problem (LOW CONFIDENCE: peak unobserved)
suspected_causes.note: best available hypothesis, deliberately low score due to the data gap

suspected_causes.hypothesis: cause cannot be confirmed without the missing 08:05-08:13 metrics
suspected_causes.note: 'insufficient evidence' is ranked above a confident-but-unsupported root cause

next_checks.action: Backfill inventory metrics 08:05-08:13 from the raw telemetry store / object storage if retained.
next_checks.rationale: Recovers the unobserved peak so the incident can actually be diagnosed.

next_checks.action: Query inventory-pg server logs and connection metrics directly for 08:03-08:13.
next_checks.rationale: An out-of-band source that bypasses the collector gap to confirm or refute the connectivity hypothesis.

next_checks.action: Fix collector restart behavior (buffering/HA) so scrapes are not dropped on config reload.
next_checks.rationale: Prevents future blind spots during incidents.
